channel.title: Comments on: Schlafly American Pale Ale, Ep. 90
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: wamille
item.dc:creator: wamille
item.description:
hey guys... my wife and i live in seoul, south korea - she's in the navy and i work on the military base as a civilian. our military exchanges don't offer us good american craft beers and the local stores and pubs carry euro beers. believe it or not, the base stores offer more foreign beers (guinness, corona, heineken, etc) than even the putrid mass produced american beers (coors, miller, bud... getting sick just thinking about it). long story short, i'm trying to help find someone who can help facilitate getting great american craft beer to the military stores in south korea. the military store has an online site (aafes.com) that gives the rules for vendors to sell their products to military stores. it seems a shame that those of us overseas aren't afforded great american craft beers. my two cents and i'll get off my soapbox.
desperate great american craft beer lover in south korea
item.content:encoded:
hey guys… my wife and i live in seoul, south korea – she’s in the navy and i work on the military base as a civilian. our military exchanges don’t offer us good american craft beers and the local stores and pubs carry euro beers. believe it or not, the base stores offer more foreign beers (guinness, corona, heineken, etc) than even the putrid mass produced american beers (coors, miller, bud… getting sick just thinking about it). long story short, i’m trying to help find someone who can help facilitate getting great american craft beer to the military stores in south korea. the military store has an online site (aafes.com) that gives the rules for vendors to sell their products to military stores. it seems a shame that those of us overseas aren’t afforded great american craft beers. my two cents and i’ll get off my soapbox.

desperate great american craft beer lover in south korea

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: It's true - the one bad thing about all these great American Craft beers is they are regional for the most part. The good thing about all these great beers is that they are regional - more to look forward to when you travel!!
item.content:encoded: It’s true – the one bad thing about all these great American Craft beers is they are regional for the most part. The good thing about all these great beers is that they are regional – more to look forward to when you travel!!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
I hate there are all these great breweries out there that you have to travel to get to!
Don't text and drive either! :)
item.content:encoded:
I hate there are all these great breweries out there that you have to travel to get to!

Don’t text and drive either! 🙂
